title: orchis patens subsp. brevicornis
intro: Orchis patens subsp. brevicornis, also known as the terrestrial orchid or early spider orchid, is a subspecies of flowering plant that belongs to the orchid family. Traditionally, the plant has been used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of orchis patens subsp. brevicornis include treating respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and asthma, as well as supporting the immune system. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used to make teas, tinctures, and infusions, although its use is largely based on traditional knowledge and may not be supported by modern scientific evidence.
